underlying_goal: Implement Mapbox Search/Autofill integration in a Travel Planner Next.js app, replacing existing geocoding with Mapbox SearchBox component
friction_detail: The initial implementation had two issues: a missing type definition file breaking CI builds, and SSR-incompatible Mapbox import causing 'document is not defined' errors in E2E tests.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement Mapbox Search autofill across multiple forms in a Next.js app; Claude executed the full plan but needed two rounds of bug fixes for CI type errors and SSR compatibility.
